trade.summary: Moderate bilateral trade. Svizzera exports pharmaceuticals, chemicals, machinery, and luxury goods. Messico exports auto parts, agricultural products, and manufactured goods. An EFTA-Messico FTA is in force.

diplomatic.summary: Cordial diplomatic relations. Both countries cooperate in multilateral forums. Svizzera provides consular services and has historically offered diplomatic support for Mexican nationals in some contexts. Svizzera's development cooperation includes some Messico-related programs.

military.summary: No military alliance or significant defense cooperation. Svizzera's neutrality precludes formal military ties. Minimal interaction.

financial.summary: Swiss multinationals (Nestlé, Novartis, Roche) have significant operations in Messico. Swiss banks provide financial services to Mexican corporations and high-net-worth individuals. Bilateral investment is moderate.

energy.summary: Very limited direct energy trade. Svizzera has supported Mexican renewable energy projects through development finance institutions.

scientific.summary: Modest scientific cooperation in biodiversity, agriculture, and life sciences. Swiss and Mexican universities maintain some exchange programs. Joint publications growing slowly.
